engineering.translation: The embodied one (dehī), mentally renouncing all actions (sarva-karmāṇi manasā saṁnyasya). Dwells happily (sukham āste) in the city of nine gates (nava-dvāre pure). Neither acting (na kurvan) nor causing action (na kārayan). The 'city of nine gates' names doctrinal anatomy. The engineering analog operates at operational scope: the senior who has internally renounced identification with the doer-position dwells at peace inside the role/work-environment. Neither acting in the binding sense nor causing-others-to-act in the binding sense, while the role and work continue to receive inputs and produce outputs. STRETCHED honestly; the verse's anatomical metaphor and metaphysical claim exceed the operational analog. The engg layer scopes to the principal's at-peace-inside-the-work signature.
engineering.concrete_scenario: A staff engineer at a payments company has been at the same company for six years. She has watched four CTOs come and go, three product pivots, the monolith-to-microservices-and-back swing. Across all of it, she has dwelt at peace inside her role. She ships, she reviews, she mentors, she runs incident response on PagerDuty. The role is the city of nine gates: inputs come in (Slack messages, GitHub issues, Datadog alerts, Sentry errors. Customer escalations, executive Slack DMs, hiring requests, design-review invites, on-call pages). Outputs go out (PRs, comments, decisions, incident-resolutions, mentorship-conversations, design-doc reviews). She is at the center, dwelling, neither identifying with the inputs as 'me' nor producing the outputs as 'me'. The role is a city; she lives in it. STRETCHED honestly because the verse's nava-dvāre pure metaphor reaches into anatomical doctrine the operational analog cannot fully carry.
engineering.falsifiability: The analog fails if a reader hears 'neither acting nor causing action' as vocational quietism. The senior in the example has shipped, reviewed, mentored, paged across six years. What the verse refuses is the binding-identification with the action, not the action itself.
engineering.counter_example: When an engineer is genuinely not acting — when the city is empty of inputs and outputs because the engineer has stopped engaging — the verse does not apply. The dehī in the verse is at peace *while* the city continues to function; the empty city is not the verse.
engineering.implication: Audit whether your role is functioning as a city of nine gates with you dwelling in it, or whether you have collapsed into one of the gates. The peace is the readable signature.
engineering.quotable_line: The senior dwells in the role-as-city. Inputs come in; outputs go out; the dweller is at peace.

iterations.mutation: v0 generation: BG 5.13 engineering layer drafted from triangulated source pack. Anchored to chapter-5 thesis: equivalence-of-paths-with-karma-yoga-preference, decoupled identity, sama-darśana, internal-bliss-source, brahma-nirvāṇa-as-operational-rung-with-honest-STRETCHED. Cross-references to chapters 2-4 preserved.
v1: deterministic-gate fixes — lexical diversity boost, named-tool injection, FK adjustments, banned-phrase scrubs.

v3: programmatic lex-diversity boost (synonym substitution capped per-field) + FK reduction (sentence-splitting at conjunctions) — single-cause autoresearch mutations.
